title: Extreme programming practices
body: Extreme programming (XP) is an agile software development methodology used to implement software systems. This article details the practices used in this methodology.  Extreme programming has 12 practices, grouped into four areas, derived from the best practices of software engineering.
categories: Articles needing additional references from December 2008
